mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TLCC.SBJCTNM, TLLS.LCTR_SCHDLNM) AS LINE_NO , TLLS.SBJCT_ID , TLLC.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , TLLC.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , TLLC.LESSON_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_ORG_CODE_NM(TLC.ORG_ID, 'LESSON_TYPE_CD', TLLC.LESSON_TYPE_CD) AS LESSON_TYPE_NM , TLCC.SBJCT_OP_TYCD , FN_GET_ORG_CODE_NM(TLC.ORG_ID, 'LEARNING_TYPE', TLCC.SBJCT_OP_TYCD) AS CRS_OPER_TYPE_NM , TLCC.DEPT_CD , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(TLC.ORG_ID, TLCC.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM , TLC.CRS_ID , TLCC.DVCLAS_NO , TLCC.SBJCTNM , TLLS.LCTR_SCHDLNM , TLLT.LCTR_CLASTMNM , TLLC.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD , CASE WHEN TLLC.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' THEN '강의동영상' WHEN TLLC.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'ETC' THEN '학습자료' ELSE '' END AS CNTS_GBN_NM , TLLC.LCTR_CONTSNM , TLLC.LESSON_CNTS_URL , TLLC.LESSON_CNTS_URL_M , TLLS.LCTR_NOTE FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL TLLS JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM TLLT ON TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = TLLT.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND TLLS.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS TLLC ON TLLS.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = TLLC.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND TLLT.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = TLLC.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND TLLC.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC ON TLLS.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND TLLC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLCC.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_CRS TLC ON TLCC.CRS_ID = TLC.CRS_ID AND TLC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLC.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
